feed.title: SAP Community - SAP Extended Warehouse Management
feed.subtitle: SAP Extended Warehouse Management Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: SAP Build App After Deployed into BTP getting Error while Open App Error GET --500 Missing zone info
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

I have SAP Build App trial version and create application and deploy into SAP BTP and successfully deployed into SAP BTP and display as HTML5 Application.

While Click on that App system is open into New browser but getting error as below

GET request to /buildappsXXXXX.buildappsXXXXX-1.2.1/index.html completed with status 500 Missing zone information

 

Kindly help me what is missing in SAP BTP, or SAP Build App. I can able to preview the application in SAP Build App but not after the Deployment into SAP BTP.

Thanks in Advance.
Regards,
Mithun

entry.title: Sandbox Data Guidelines fair usage and How to check it
entry.content:
As documented in SAP Commerce Cloud Service Description, SAP Commerce Cloud offers a variety of different sizes of sandbox environments with their own respective resource limitations.

As such, often one may see an issue starting with Data related aspects of the application if these limitations are not taken in account. E.g.: Import Database backup from higher tier into lower environments, specially in case of Development.

  • Most common but not limited issue observed as cosenquence of the above example would be, Solr indexing starting to fail with pods restarting due to Insufficient Memory (OOM Killed).

Therefore, in this case it is worth highlighting the content found in Sandbox Data Guidelines:

  • "After rigorous testing, the recommended data volume works well with standard SAP Commerce code in the corresponding environments. If you exceed the recommended data volume limits, SAP can't guarantee resource-related system stability in your sandbox environments, which includes aspects such as service speed, pod OOM/restarts, disk storage, and DTU saturation thresholds."
  • In the above document it will be also available to compare each type of Sandbox environment (Dev / Stag) and their respective Data Volume limitations / guidelines.

Now in case you're not sure how to check the sizes of the referred tables from this document, you may perform this simply by accessing your HAC endpoint and running queries to check this Data Volume.

  • E.g.: The following groovy script would provide you with the data:
import de.hybris.platform.servicelayer.search.FlexibleSearchQuery;
import de.hybris.platform.servicelayer.search.SearchResult;

FlexibleSearchQuery flexibleSearchQuery=null;
/*Check the size of the given types*/
def types = ["Product","ProductFeature","Cart","Order","User","Address"];
types.each{type->
  query = "select count(*) from {"+type+"}";
  flexibleSearchQuery = new FlexibleSearchQuery(query);
  List l = new ArrayList();
  l.add(Integer.class);
  flexibleSearchQuery.setResultClassList(l);
  SearchResult result = spring.getBean("flexibleSearchService").search(flexibleSearchQuery);
  println type +": " + result.getResult().get(0);
}

entry.title: SAP Crystal Reports, developer version for Microsoft Visual Studio
entry.content:
Hello, we are using SAP Crystal Reports, developer version for Microsoft Visual Studio version 13.0.20.2399 and we are trying to get the exact End Of life or End Of Maintenance dates for this specific version.

Could you please advise? Thank you

entry.title: Re: Batch creation in error using 262 movement
entry.content:
Hi,

To choose the 262 movement type, initiate the reversal process for the 261 movement type. If you possess a material document number, opt for cancellation with reference to the material document number. The system will then automatically select the 262 movement type and the associated batch number.

 

Regards

entry.title: Enviosd de correspondencia 1LQ
entry.content:
Hola comunidad,

en esta oportunidad me dirijo a ustedes con el fin de obtener alguna ayuda en el tema de envio de correos, ya que he configurado el scope item 1lq en su totalidad, pero cuando realizo el envio de mis correos no llega nada a mis direcciones de correo electronico configuradas previamente,

 

adjunto archivo donde se confirma el envio de los mail pero no llegan estos a las bandejas, no existe una salida a pesar de que en esta aplicacion la confirma.

entry.title: Available Business Add-Ins (BAdIs) for Key User Extensibility for Production Planning and Control
entry.content:
I would like to know the availbale BAdIs for Production Planning and Control.

 


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: Available Business Add-Ins (BAdIs) for Key User Exten...
entry.content:
Hi, 

Please take a look at the following link from SAP Help:

  • Business Add-Ins (BAdIs) for Key User Extensibility

In this link you will find all the BAdIs already released for Production Planning and Control.

You can also check the following link with additional information on how to explore released Business Add-Ins (BAdIs) from SAP S/4HANA Cloud on SAP Business Accelerator Hub (formerly called SAP API Business Hub):

  • Explore Business Add-Ins (BAdIs) for SAP S/4HANA Cloud on SAP Business Accelerator Hub

If any of the available BAdIs meet your needs, you can submit an improvement request in SAP Customer Influence, please take a look at note 2712608 - Request for new features in SAP S/4HANA Cloud Manufacturing.

Best regards.

entry.title: Re: List Report V4 - Hide Copy action button
entry.content: I just tried this morning with 1.122.1 with manifest changes and they seem to reflect. One more thin I noticed different in your manifest is 'enablePaste' but I suppose it should be just 'copy'

entry.title: Batch/Serial Number Same in 1 material component in SAP-ECC.
entry.content:
Hello everyone,

Question: 1. can i used same batch number and serial number in 1 component material that goes into a serialized FG items?

2. Which has better control in monitoring component material ? batch or serial numbering?

3. Can we re-use the same batch for same serial number that goes back to inventory many times?

entry.title: Re: SAP Commerce Cloud Maintenance Notification Kubernete...
entry.content:
Hello,

There are regular updates to the infrastructure behind SAP Commerce Cloud. See KBA:

  • 3119489 - Kubernetes Cluster Upgrade - FAQ

Besides that message, you may receive a notification via CSNS. SAP Cloud System Notification Subscriptions (CSNS) application makes it easy to add, customize, and manage subscriptions to the Cloud Availability Center notifications. Using this tool, and keeping up-to-date contacts, customer can remain constantly informed and receive timely updates regarding your SAP cloud services, including – but not limited to – planned and unplanned downtimes and any other customer communication. See KBAs:

  • 2115584 - Add/remove a user for outage, data center maintenance, downtime, or release information notifications - SuccessFactors
  • 2896942 - How Super Administrators and Cloud Administrators manage Cloud Notifications for other S-users - SAP for Me
  • 2900069 - How S-users can manage their own Cloud Notification subscriptions - SAP for Me
  • 3164317 - Which cloud products are available in the Manage Cloud Service Availability Notifications? - SAP for Me

Regards,
Giuseppe

entry.title: add a field from marc table in top-of-page and alv report for CL11(display bom level by level)
entry.content:
To Display Custom Field in BOM transactions CS01, ... - SAP Community

In this article, it mentions the program for CS11 is RCS11001, but actually it's different.  I tried se93 then it shows the module pool name is SAPMC29L. It looks very complicated to update SAPMC29L to display a custom field. 

I appreciate for any input.

entry.title: Change material type KMAT to HALB
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

I'm trying to change the material type KMAT to HALB. I've set for deletion and archived all purchase orders and also removed the stock from the material sending the stock for other material and/or scrapping the stock. But for some reason the batch number remains in the material. When I try to change the material type in MMAM t-code the message was shown:

The material type cannot be changed.

The reasons for this are:

There are independent valuation segments that are not permitted in the new material type. You must archive them first.

ValArea ValType
ZA010000822817
ZA010000822818
ZA010000822819
ZA010000822820
ZA010000822821
ZA010000822822
ZA010000822823
ZA010000822824
ZA010000833242

After that I've set deletion flag for all batches (valuation types) in MSC2N t-code and tried to archived them in SARA t-code, the following messages was shown:

MCH1: Material  0000822817 dependent batch records exist

MCHB: Material ZA01 ZA01 0000822817 unrestricted-use stock exists for previous period.

Can anyone suggest how to proceed?

Regards,

Christian Lima

entry.title: Re: Deployment duration with CCV2
entry.content:
Hello,

You can always use KBAs 3077364 and 3388981 to monitor/troubleshoot migrations/initializations.
The first KBA explains why deployments can take different times to finish.

It may be necessary to optimize the database with indexes in order to speed up deployments. For that, a case has to be created for Product Support.

See Deployment with a Database Update: 

When you update the database during a rolling update, the background processing and Backoffice aspect are scaled down to prevent cron jobs from running during the update.

Regards,
Giuseppe

entry.title: BAPI_PO_CREATE1 No Error But Not Creating
entry.content:
Hey Everyone ,

I'm trying to create PO with BAPI_PO_CREATE1. I don't get any errors, but when I look at the EKKO table with the document number, there is no record. 

I use the function in LOOP, and in each attempt it creates the document in the 1st and 3rd loop, but it does not create the document in the 2nd loop.

It returns the same RETURN result for all three of them, but as I said, it does not create the second one, even though it says it has been created.

I would like to know your ideas . Tahnks All !

The picture of BAPI_PO_CREATE1's return ;

entry.title: Re: Need Help to extract value from message with groovy s...
entry.content:
Hello @Jeevitha_04 ,

I hope this solution aligns with your needs. I came across this suggestion while using ChatGPT.

Considering that your ID is always 16 digits long, I believe this solution might be suitable for your case. Could you please provide more details or clarify if this fits your requirements?

import com.sap.gateway.ip.core.customdev.util.Message;
import java.util.HashMap;
import java.util.regex.Matcher;
import java.util.regex.Pattern;

def Message processData(Message message) {
    //Body
    def body = message.getBody();
    def rootNode = new XmlSlurper().parseText(body);
    def payload = rootNode.Payload.text();
    def pattern = ~/(\d{16})/
    def matcher = (payload =~ pattern)
    if (matcher.find()) {
        def matchedDigits = matcher.group(1)
    } else {
        println "No match found"
    }
    def properties = message.getProperties();
    message.setProperty("newProperty", matcher.group());
    return message;
}

 

Best regards,

Burak

entry.title: Re: crystal report 2016
entry.content: Hi techii, you can get a trial version of 2016 here. Crystal Reports Server is also available as a trial. Any particular reason why you'd want 2016 over 2020?

entry.title: Procedimiento de Autorización por Cantidad y Usuario en Orden de Compra
entry.content:
Hola a todos,

La razón por la que escribo es la siguiente:

Tengo una solicitud en la que se necesita que cuando una Orden de Compra se encuentre dentro del rango de monto de 0.00 a 10,000.00 genere el proceso de autorización a "UsuarioManagerA" y cuando el rango del monto sea de 10,000.01 a + genere el proceso de autorización a "UsuarioManagerB".

¿Alguna idea de como hacerlo?
